value.0: Elder Robes of the Enabled Hand
Fashioned from rough-hewn wood, this simple door swings on ill-fitting hinges.
Fashioned from rough-hewn wood, this simple door swings on ill-fitting hinges.
Detailed carvings cover the surface of this finely-crafted door. The handiwork is of high quality and no doubt came at quite an expense.
Etched and oiled, the carvings on this door lend depth to its prominent woodgrain.
